director.name: 阿丽萨·科洛索娃 Alisa Kolosova

introduction: Hannah's is overwhelmed by her emotions. She is afraid of the new and afraid to let go. So she throws herself into fantasy worlds full of dancing, singing and without any heartache. Back to her ex-boyfriend? Or straight into the new adventure? In the musical world she can express her inner struggle - in the musical world everything seems possible. But Hannah is accompanied by her best friend Lu, who, like a best friend does, tries with all her means to save Hannah from evil and wrong decisions.
